name: Junk Blocks
short_description: This is a relaxing and casual puzzle elimination game. Drag blocks onto the board to fill rows or columns and clear them. Watch out for "junk" blocks that obstruct progress and require match-three combos to remove. Use your skills to achieve high scores and test your mental limits!
detailed_description:
In this game, you’ll drag various blocks onto the board, filling rows or columns to clear them and score points.


Experience the classic puzzle fun while racing against the clock to achieve the highest score possible. Whether you're a casual player or a seasoned pro, there's fun and challenge waiting for you!

KEY FEATURES
  • Simple and enjoyable elimination experience
    Enjoy the joy of quick elimination and continuous combos.
  • Undo feature
    Placed a crucial block wrong by mistake? Try using the undo feature.
  • Different game modes
    Experience various gameplay modes, each offering its own unique feel.
  • Different game themes
    Switch between different themes and choose your favorite art style to play in.
  • Collectible junk encyclopedia
    A wide variety of junk items will randomly appear—collect them and enrich your encyclopedia.
  • Personal leaderboard
    Your best scores will be recorded—keep improving your skills and witness your growth.
  • Simple controls
    Enjoy the game easily with just mouse clicks and drags.
